$comment: Project-scoped MCP servers. Voxi's observability backend is Google Cloud Operations (Cloud Logging + Cloud Trace) — see docs/observability.md and PLAN.md §11. There is no query MCP wired: for agent-driven RCA, use the `gcloud` CLI through Bash (e.g. `gcloud logging read 'jsonPayload.trace_id="<id>"' --project <proj>`). The optional local dev stack (infra/observability/) exposes a local Grafana at :3000 if you want trace waterfalls while developing.
